Home / Website Builders & CMS / Hugo

Hugo — open source alternative

Blazing-fast static site generator in Go.

Strengths

  • Thousands of pages built in seconds.
  • No runtime dependencies on the server.
  • Huge theme library.

Weaknesses

  • No visual editor — Markdown and templates.
  • Content updates require re-build.
  • Steep learning curve for Go template syntax.
License: Apache-2.0 Self-host difficulty: 1/5 Self-host onlyDesktop: Windows, macOS, Linux

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Hugo is used as an alternative to

Wix

Template-driven website builder.

See all alternatives →
